Video.summary: Lynn Redgrave joins Carol in "A Dirty English Movie." In "Carol & Sis", Carol and Vicki try to hide a dog.
Video.title: Lynn Redgrave

Video.summary: Harvey Korman guests. Features a number about glory & crisis of mid-life. On "Carol & Sis", Carol goes gaga.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Tonight's guests: Maggie Smith and Tim Conway!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Maggie Smith, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Carol struggles with "Easy Open" packaging, Harvey & Tim spoof Jacques Cousteau, and Carol & Vicki are torn.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Steve Martin and Betty White catch a wave in the movie spoof "Beach Blanket Boo-Boo!".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Steve Martin, Betty White

Video.summary: Alan Alda stars! This episode features Alda as a department store Santa, and as Eunice's brother Larry.
Video.title: Alan Alda

Video.summary: Sammy Davis, Jr. stars as a flamboyant galley slave, then appears before the Queen & King as a debt collector.
Video.title: Sammy Davis Jr.

Video.summary: Betty White plays Eunice's sister as "The Family" celebrates Mama's birthday.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Betty White

Video.summary: Paul Sand guests! Sketches dealing with weddings are featured. Also: bits related to the energy crisis.
Video.title: Paul Sand

Video.summary: Tim & Harvey are generals at the signing of a peace treaty, while "The Family" gathers for Mae's funeral.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guest star Steve Lawrence takes the stage to sing a duet with Dick.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Soupy Sales and Carol play a pair of shoppers browsing samples of sexy cologne.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Barbara McNair, Soupy Sales

Video.summary: Rock Hudson stars, appearing with Carol as husband and wife anchors, and as secretary Mrs. Wiggins' date.
Video.title: Rock Hudson

Video.summary: Carol plays a housewife obsessed with celebrity gossip. Then, a take-off on a classic with "Rebecky."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guests Mickey Rooney and John Davidson join Carol and Vicki to tell the tale of "The Four Funns Of Broadway."
Video.title: Mickey Rooney, John Davidson

Video.summary: Dick Van Dyke & Tony Randall star! Includes Dick as a salesman, and Carol & Tony as marrieds.
Video.title: Dick Van Dyke, Tony Randall

Video.summary: Carl Reiner appears in two sketches: as the husband of an accident-prone woman, and as a marriage counselor.
Video.title: Carl Reiner

Video.summary: Guests James Garner, George Carlin, and Ken Berry join the gang for an evening of can't-miss comedy.
Video.title: James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry

Image.alt: James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Features Harvey as a man faking whiplash. On "The Family", Mama, Ed, and Eunice are invited to Mickey's place.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Ray Charles is a highlight of this episode, featuring Tim Conway in a sketch where they are billboard hangers.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Ray Charles

Video.summary: Guest Robert Goulet joins Q&A. Sketches include the aftermath of a party, and a maid entranced by a star.
Video.title: Robert Goulet

Video.summary: Nanette Fabray & Joan Rivers guest! Featuring Rivers' comedy, a "V.I.P." interview, and a talk show segment.
Video.title: Eydie Gorme, Joan Rivers

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence plays an unsuccessful comic. Also: commercial spoofs; Tim at war, attempting to fire a cannon.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: David Hartman & Paula Kelly star! Features Nora Desmond and George and Zelda. Also: "This Is Your Lifetime."
Video.title: David Hartman, Paula Kelly

Video.summary: Rita Moreno guest stars as a nurse to the accident-prone Carol. Also featured: Tim as a hapless officer.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Rita Moreno

Video.summary: Tonight's guest: Mr. Steve Lawrence!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Bob Newhart appears in "Carol & Sis" as Roger's accountant. Also: a hungover Harvey gets a bigger headache.
Video.title: Bob Newhart

Video.summary: Jim Nabors returns as a guest! Sketches include Harvey as a hammy actor, and Jim as an emergency room patient.
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Mrs. Wiggins attends a convention with Mr. Tudball! And, saluting the year in TV commercials with Ben Vereen.
Video.title: Ben Vereen

Video.summary: Imogene Coca and Mel Torme guest. Coca and Carol are wives of rivals, and Torme is Igor in a Dracula sketch.
Video.title: Imogene Coca, Mel Torme

Video.summary: Ross Martin and John Davidson guest! John shows off his pipes, and Harvey is interrupted by an extortionist.
Video.title: Ross Martin, John Davidson

Video.summary: Guest Gloria Swanson joins the Q&A. Sketches include "Carol & Sis" where the Bradfords discourage an operator.
Video.title: Gloria Swanson

Video.summary: Ken Berry stars with Carol as Western movie stars in "The Saga Of Lily And Billy." Dick Cavett crashes Q&A .
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Guest George Gobel joins a "V.I.P." interview of a Duke and Duchess. A "Carol & Sis" sketch is also a prank.
Video.title: George Gobel

Video.summary: Sid Caesar and Barbara McNair guest. McNair and Carol spoof a series, and "V.I.P." features silent film stars.
Video.title: Barbara McNair, Sid Caesar

Video.summary: Paul Sand & Eydie Gorme guest. Includes salute to series like "Dr. Kildaire", and Paul & Eydie join a sketch.
Video.title: Paul Sand, Eydie Gorrme

Video.summary: Guest Stars Mel Torme, Nanette Fabray, and Don Rickles pitch in to help tell "The Tin Pan Alley Story."
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles

Image.alt: Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles

Video.summary: Tim Conway & the cast head to Sydney, Australia! Tim leads the Sydney Orchestra, & Harvey deals with co-star.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Features the best variety show ensemble on TV with "The Doily Sisters," about twin Vaudeville performers.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guest Andy Griffith appears in "Mr. Law & Order." On "Carol & Sis", Roger leaves Carol a football widow.
Video.title: Andy Griffith

Video.summary: Paul Lynde & Nanette Fabray join commercial outtakes! "Carol & Sis" finds Carol filling in for a secretary.
Video.title: Paul Lynde, Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: The Family steps out as Mama, Eunice, and Ed go to a restaurant, and Tim's "Oldest Man" is a sheriff.
Video.title: Family Show
